hooks.command: payload=$(cat); file=$(printf '%s' "$payload" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$file" in *packages/*.ts) (cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" && npx --no-install tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.base.json) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac

payload=$(cat); cmd=$(printf '%s' "$payload" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -Eq 'git[[:space:]]+reset[[:space:]]+--hard|git[[:space:]]+push[[:space:]]+(--force|-f)|git[[:space:]]+branch[[:space:]]+-D'; then printf 'Destructive git command blocked. Confirm with the user before retrying: %s\n' "$cmd" >&2; exit 2; fi
